question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"export const restoreElements|export const restoreAppState|export function restoreElements|export function restoreAppState\" packages\\excalidraw\\data\\restore.ts"
baseline.answer:
**Tour**
- `[excalidraw-app/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/index.tsx#L1)` is the browser entry. It just creates the React root and mounts the hosted app.
- `[excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L215)` is the host bootstrap. `initializeScene` loads local storage, URL-backed scenes, or collaboration state; later the wrapper renders `<Excalidraw>` with `initialData` and callbacks at `[excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L1271)`. If your change affects boot, persistence, or collaboration entry, start here.
- `[packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L67)` is the public API entrypoint. `ExcalidrawBase` normalizes `UIOptions` and `imageOptions`, bridges `onExcalidrawAPI`, and wraps the editor in `InitializeApp` and `EditorJotaiProvider`. The memoized public export is at `[packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L310)`.
- `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L651)` is the runtime engine. The constructor creates `Scene`, `Store`, `History`, `Renderer`, and `ActionManager`; `componentDidMount` wires listeners and emits the imperative API at `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L3183)`. `render()` composes `LayerUI`, `StaticCanvas`, and `InteractiveCanvas` at `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2139)`, and the pointer/update hot path lives around `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L4717)`, `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L7997)`, and `[packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L8458)`.
- `[packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/scene/Renderer.ts#L89)` is the derivation layer. It turns scene + viewport into the renderable and visible element sets the canvases consume.
- `[packages/element/src/Scene.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/element/src/Scene.ts#L108)` is the authoritative element container. `replaceAllElements`, `mutateElement`, and `triggerUpdate` are the lowest-level “the scene changed” path.
- `[packages/element/src/store.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/element/src/store.ts#L78)` snapshots changes and classifies them as durable vs ephemeral increments. That is what feeds undo/redo and `onIncrement`.
- The loading and normalization layer is `[packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts#L817)`, `[packages/excalidraw/data/reconcile.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/reconcile.ts#L73)`, `[packages/excalidraw/data/blob.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/blob.ts#L138)`, and `[packages/excalidraw/data/library.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/library.ts#L677)`.

**Read Next**
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/excalidraw.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/excalidraw.test.tsx#L21)` for the public API contract. The most relevant subsections are zen mode, grid mode, `UIOptions`, name, `autoFocus`, and `MainMenu`.
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/tool.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/tool.test.tsx#L14)` for imperative API tool switching and tool locking.
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/dragCreate.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/dragCreate.test.tsx#L37)` for the pointer-driven create flow.
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/selection.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/selection.test.tsx#L62)` for selection, box-select, and lasso behavior.
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/data/restore.test.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/data/restore.test.ts#L26)` and `[packages/excalidraw/tests/data/reconcile.test.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/data/reconcile.test.ts#L139)` for the load-time and collaboration normalization path.
- `[packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx#L12)` for one app-level startup edge case.
- If you want keyboard behavior too, add `[packages/excalidraw/tests/shortcuts.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/shortcuts.test.tsx#L11)`.

If you tell me what behavior you’re about to change, I can narrow this to the exact 3 to 5 files and tests to read first.
